metadata.description: Open plugin marketplace for Cowork and Claude Code, curated by BackendOutput. Wraps high-quality MCP servers and workflows into one-click-installable plugins.

plugins.name: godot-mcp
plugins.description: Connect Claude to the Godot game engine. Launch the editor, run projects, capture debug output, create scenes, add nodes, and load sprites — all directly from chat. Wraps @coding-solo/godot-mcp.
